name: aMAZEd
short_description: aMAZEd is an atmospheric first-person exploration adventure game with elements of action and horror. Lost in a labyrinth, prey to others. Find as many items and clues to escape it and enjoy escalating difficulty in both exploration and action aspects of the game.
detailed_description:
About me

I'm a starting game developer since 2019. aMAZEd is my very first project on which I've learned basics of operating a game engine and graphics. Since my strengths are more on the programming side in the whole development process, you'll see some free assets used in this game (characters and several items) which I haven't been able to produce by myself - if you occur to notice some graphics with worse production values, it's probably made by me. Thanks in advance for your feedback.


Localisation

This game includes English, Czech and Slovak localisations. Localisation file is accessible to anyone - feel free to add another language to this game.


About the Game

Wake up in a narrow corridor to quickly realize you're all alone and utterly lost. Escape the dungeons - overcome many traps, solve puzzles, search for useful items and try to avoid the monster following your every step as you try to escape the labyrinth. But what if there's something worse than the monster? What about hungry zombies? Will you fight back?
